synopsis: A caravan crosses a sea of golden dunes beneath enormous sky-whales, where a singing compass, ancient bones, and a storm-lit oasis suggest different routes forward.

world_bible.premise: A caravan crosses a sea of golden dunes beneath enormous sky-whales, where a singing compass, ancient bones, and a storm-lit oasis suggest different routes forward.

root_state.narrative_status: A caravan crosses a sea of golden dunes beneath enormous sky-whales, where a singing compass, ancient bones, and a storm-lit oasis suggest different routes forward.

root_prompt: Shared root comic panel for an interactive branching story. Wide sunlit desert fantasy scene with a small caravan paused on rolling golden dunes. Above the caravan, several enormous translucent sky-whales drift through the bright blue air like living clouds. A young guide in a wind scarf holds a small bronze singing compass while pack animals wait nearby. In the distance are three readable choices: a whale shadow crossing the sand, half-buried ancient rib bones, and a green oasis flickering under a far sandstorm. Warm adventurous illustration, comic panel framing, sweeping scale, clear silhouettes, ochre sand, turquoise sky, pearly whale bodies, magical realism, no text, no captions, no modern vehicles, no user-specific details.
